zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice d'Arques於1025年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾時，她的父親Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques26歲，母親Amelie Rouen15歲。她於1044年與Wolfric Mercia在英國爾從萊頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1086年在英國越可爾索普 阿其享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice d'Arques于1025年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利阿爾可-拉-巴塔爾时，她的父亲Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques26岁，母亲Amelie Rouen15岁。她于1044年与Wolfric Mercia在英国爾從萊頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1086年在英国越可爾索普 阿其享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice d'Arques was born in 1025, in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques, was 26 and her mother, Amelie Rouen, was 15. She married Wolfric Mercia in 1044, in Congleton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1086, in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice d'Arques est née en 1025, à Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Amelie Rouen, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Wolfric Mercia en 1044, à Congleton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1086, à Thorp Arch, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice d'Arques 1025 in Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques 26 und ihre Mutter Amelie Rouen 15. Sie hat 1044 in Congleton, Cheshire, England Wolfric Mercia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1086 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice d'Arques è nata il nel 1025 nel Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Amelie Rouen, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Wolfric Mercia nel 1044, nel Congleton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1086, nel Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice d'Arquesが1025年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアルクエス-ラ-バティイルで生まれた時，父Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arquesは26歳，母Amelie Rouenは15歳であった。1044年にイギリスチェシュアイアコングレトンでWolfric Merciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1086年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルプ アーチで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice d'Arques(이)가 1025년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 아크스-라-바테이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amelie Rouen(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1044년 영국 체실르 콘글레턴에서 Wolfric Mercia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1086년 영국 요르크실르 소 아치에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice d'Arques nasceu em 1025, em Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Amelie Rouen, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Wolfric Mercia em 1044, em Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1086, em Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice d'Arques родилась в 1025 г. в местности аркуес-ла-батеилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Amelie Rouen, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wolfric Mercia в 1044 г. в местности конглетон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1086 г. в местности таурп арч, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice d'Arques nació en 1025, en Arques-la-Bataille, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Godfrey FitzGoscelin d'Arques, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Amelie Rouen, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Wolfric Mercia en 1044, en Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1086, en Thorp Arch, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
